name: Neal.fun
description: A collection of fun, interactive web experiments — from spending a billion dollars to the size of space.

name: The Useless Web
description: Click a button and get sent to a random, hilariously pointless website. Pure internet chaos.

name: Pointer Pointer
description: Move your mouse anywhere on the page and it finds a photo of someone literally pointing at your cursor.

name: NASA APOD
description: A new stunning photo of the universe every single day, explained by a professional astronomer.

name: Bartosz Ciechanowski
description: Deeply interactive visual explanations of how everyday things work — GPS, engines, clocks, waves.

name: Our World in Data
description: Research and data visualizations that show how the world is changing — poverty, health, energy, and more.

name: Brilliant
description: Learn math, logic, science and CS through bite-sized interactive challenges. Brain workout mode: ON.

name: Typing Club
description: Learn to touch-type fast with fun, gamified lessons. You'll thank yourself forever.

name: Khan Academy
description: Free world-class education in math, science, computing, and more. Actually great for all ages.

name: Radiooooo
description: A musical time machine — pick any decade and country and listen to what was playing on the radio.

name: Wikimedia Commons
description: Millions of freely usable images, audio, and video from around the world. Endlessly fascinating to explore.

name: Regexr
description: Learn and test Regular Expressions in real time with visual highlighting and a cheat sheet.

name: Radio Garden
description: Spin a 3D globe and tune into live radio stations from every corner of the world. Thrissur, Tokyo, New York — all live.

name: My 90s TV
description: A simulated TV experience from the 90s — real commercials, shows, and music videos playing on loop. Pure nostalgia.

name: Learning Music by Ableton
description: Learn the fundamentals of music through interactive, in-browser lessons. Beat making, chords, scales — all playable.

name: AFFiNE
description: An open-source all-in-one workspace — notes, docs, and whiteboards combined. The privacy-first Notion alternative.

name: GeoFS
description: Fly a real aircraft anywhere on Earth right in your browser using satellite imagery. A surprisingly serious flight simulator.

name: Space Type Generator
description: Type anything and watch each letter come alive with mesmerizing space-themed animations. Oddly satisfying.

name: Floor796
description: An endlessly expanding animated pixel-art scene packed with hundreds of pop culture easter eggs. You'll spend hours finding them.

name: Zoomquilt 2
description: An infinitely zooming collaborative painting that descends forever through surreal worlds. Hypnotic and endless.

name: Scale of the Universe
description: Zoom from the Planck length to the observable universe and everything in between. Mind-blowing sense of scale.

name: Find the Invisible Cow
description: Move your mouse to find an invisible cow guided only by an increasingly loud MOO. Peak internet absurdity.

name: Hacker Typer
description: Open it, start typing, and look like a Hollywood hacker. Any key you press generates lines of code. Impressively convincing.

name: TV Garden
description: Watch free live TV channels from countries all over the world — news, entertainment, sports, all in one place.

name: Pomoflight
description: A beautiful Pomodoro timer that turns your focus sessions into a flight journey. Work feels like an adventure.

name: 21st.dev
description: Discover and copy community-made UI components instantly. The GitHub for beautiful interface building blocks.

name: Entertrained — Typing
description: Improve your typing speed by typing actual famous books. Get faster at typing while finishing a novel.

name: Finviz
description: A real-time financial market heatmap and stock screener. See the entire stock market as a color-coded visual grid.

name: Diode — Circuit Simulator
description: Build and simulate electronic circuits in 3D right in your browser. Drag, connect, and watch the circuit come alive.

name: Git City
description: Visualize any GitHub profile as a 3D pixel-art city — buildings represent repos, activity lights up the skyline.

name: Contexto
description: Guess the secret word — every guess is ranked by AI similarity. Like Wordle but with no letter hints, only semantic closeness.

name: Letroso
description: A daily word puzzle game where you unscramble letters to find hidden words. Fast, fun, and surprisingly addictive.

name: Expresso
description: Paste any text and instantly see overused words, sentence length issues, and writing style stats. A writer's best tool.

name: Conexo
description: Group 16 words into 4 hidden categories — a daily puzzle that tests lateral thinking and vocabulary. Harder than it looks.

name: Mind Luster
description: Over 300,000 free online courses from top providers — all in one searchable place. Learn anything at your own pace.

name: Fable
description: A social app for bookworms and binge-watchers — discover what your friends are reading and watching, and share reactions.

name: MapFight
description: Compare the real size of any two countries side by side on a map. Shockingly reveals how distorted most maps are.

name: City Roads
description: Draw all the roads of any city in the world at once — creates stunning map art from OpenStreetMap data.

name: Excalidraw
description: A virtual collaborative whiteboard that feels like actual hand-drawn sketches. Perfect for diagrams, brainstorming, or just doodling.

name: Noun Project
description: A massive library of clean, minimal icons for everything imaginable. Free to browse, great for projects and presentations.

name: Sloyd AI
description: Type a description and get a 3D model generated instantly in your browser. Mind-bending what AI can create in seconds.

name: Rodin AI
description: Generate detailed 3D models from text or images for free. Turn a sentence into a fully downloadable 3D asset.

name: Coursiv
description: Learn AI skills for work, business, and side hustles through short structured courses. Practical, not theoretical.

name: HDLBits
description: Practice digital logic and Verilog HDL through hundreds of progressive circuit design exercises — with instant feedback.

name: Artikel Game
description: A fun game to learn German articles (der, die, das) through quick-fire rounds. Great for German learners of any level.

name: Paper Me
description: Turn your photos into beautiful paper-cut style art. A uniquely satisfying creative tool right in the browser.

name: Story Tribe
description: A collaborative storytelling app where you and friends co-write stories together. Great for creativity and imagination.

name: Runable
description: Run, test, and share code snippets interactively in the browser. Clean interface, instant results, no setup needed.

name: Wolfram Alpha
description: Type any question and get computed, factual answers — math, science, history, nutrition, dates. The world's smartest calculator.

name: Capitol Trades
description: Track real stock trades made by US politicians. See exactly what senators and congress members are buying and selling.

name: Remove Paywall
description: Paste any paywalled article URL and read it for free. Access NYT, Bloomberg, and more without a subscription.

name: Airmore AI
description: A collection of free AI tools — image generation, writing, voice, video, and more. All in one place with no login.

name: Exercism
description: Practice coding in 67 languages with real exercises and get feedback from volunteer mentors. Free, deep, and genuinely useful.

name: Coddy
description: Bite-sized interactive coding challenges that teach you to code through doing. Clean UX, great for beginners.

name: Muscle Wiki
description: Click any muscle on a 3D body map and instantly see the best exercises for it. The best free fitness reference on the web.

name: Auto Catalog Archive
description: Browse thousands of original car brochures and catalogs from the 1950s to today. A paradise for car enthusiasts.

name: JMail
description: Instant disposable email addresses — no signup, no password. Perfect for avoiding spam when trying out new services.

name: Alison
description: Over 5,000 free online courses with real certificates. From IT to languages to business — all genuinely free.

name: True Size
description: Drag any country across the world map to see its true geographic size. Reveals how much Mercator maps deceive us.

name: World Monitor
description: A live dashboard of the world — population, births, deaths, CO2, energy use, all ticking in real time.

name: EmuPedia
description: Play thousands of retro games — DOS, SNES, Game Boy, Arcade — directly in your browser. Pure gaming nostalgia.

name: White Screen
description: A pure white screen for your monitor — useful for cleaning screens, lighting for photos, or just blanking out distractions.
